title: Crunchy Fresh Uruguayan Chicken Wrap
description: Fresh, crunchy, festive wrap featuring roasted chicken, smoky quinoa, avocado, and citrus slaw, all tucked into a warm naan.
instructions: In a bowl, toss chicken strips with olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper until coated.
Spread chicken on a baking sheet and roast for 15-18 minutes, turning halfway, until cooked through and slightly charred.
Meanwhile, warm naan in a dry skillet or microwave for 15 seconds.
In a bowl, combine cooked quinoa, shredded red cabbage, lime juice, and chopped cilantro; season with salt and pepper to taste.
To assemble, spread a spoonful of the quinoa slaw onto each naan, then layer with roasted chicken strips and avocado slices.
Fold the sides of the naan over the filling and roll tightly.
Serve immediately, optionally with a side of lime wedges.
Enjoy the crunchy, fresh flavors of Uruguay in every bite.
